---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    css: resume.css
---

<div class="page-container">

# Tyler Lowry
**Data Science Graduate Student**

[tjlowry02@gmail.com](mailto:tjlowry02@gmail.com) | 480-297-6545 | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tylerj-lowry)

---

## Education

<div class="experience-entry">
### Texas A&M University | College Station, TX
*Aug 2025 – Present*  
**Master of Science, Data Science** (Statistics Track)
</div>

<div class="experience-entry">
### Brigham Young University-Idaho | Rexburg, ID
*Apr 2025*  
**Bachelor of Science, Data Science** – Accounting Minor – Machine Learning Certificate  
- GPA: 3.89
</div>

---

## Technical Skills

**Languages:** Python, R, SQL, TypeScript, PHP, HTML, CSS, C#
**Frameworks/Libraries:** TensorFlow, Pandas, Polars, NumPy, Scikit-learn, PySpark, Tidyverse, REST API, React, Node.js  
**Tools:** Docker, Git, AWS, Databricks, Power BI, Tableau, Jupyter, Adobe Suite

---

## Work Experience

<div class="experience-entry">
### Team Lead/Developer
*BYU-Idaho McKay Maclab* | Rexburg, ID | *Jan 2023 – July 2025*

- Designed interactive Streamlit dashboards to track KPI performance, resulting in a 14% average improvement across all metrics
- Collaborated with a team of 3 in full stack development of Maclab website and 3D printing queue
- Facilitated weekly meetings to discuss goals, track task progress, and deliver short training sessions to the team
- Conducted interviews, reviewed resumes to screen candidates, and provided training to new employees
</div>

<div class="experience-entry">
### TA/Tutor  
*BYU-Idaho Department of Mathematics* | Rexburg, ID | *April 2024 – April 2025*

- Served as teaching assistant and tutor for 5 core courses including "Intro to Programming," "Data Science Programming," and "Biostatistics," plus staffed the Data Science Tutoring Drop-In Lab supporting 200+ students per semester
- Led weekly group meetings of 10 students and conducted 7-10 individual tutoring appointments per week, focusing on Python, R, Excel, and statistical analysis
- Graded 100+ student assignments weekly and provided detailed feedback on areas of improvement, while offering real-time problem-solving support for walk-in students across all data science courses
</div>

<div class="experience-entry">
### Machine Learning Engineer Intern
*PIC Business Systems* | San Antonio, TX | *May 2024 – Sept 2024*

- Built an ensembled ARIMA + LightGBM model for 90-day item-location demand forecasting, improving median MAPE by 30% over the existing baseline
- Engineered lag features, rolling statistics, and normalized targets across hierarchical time series to capture seasonality and cross-warehouse demand patterns
- Integrated external signals (weather, calendar/holiday effects) via API pipelines in Pandas to improve forecast robustness on volatile SKUs
</div>

<div class="experience-entry">
### Data Engineering Intern
*George W. Lowry Inc.* | Salida, CA | *Sept 2023 – Dec 2023*

- Reverse-engineered an undocumented legacy database nearing end-of-support by reconstructing the schema from printed documentation and tracing production reports back to source tables, establishing a working knowledge base of the system
- Led migration from Informix to AWS to support the company's transition to PetroleumRx for CRM operations, re-architecting the schema by eliminating redundant joins, correcting foreign key relationships, and optimizing indexes — reducing report generation runtime by nearly 2 hours
- Researched and recommended AWS EC2 instance options tailored to workload requirements, informing a deployment that increased compute capacity while lowering costs and eliminating recurring server crashes that had disrupted daily operations
</div>

## Research

<div class="experience-entry">
### 3D Spatial Transcriptomics Colocalization Analysis
*Graduate Research with Dr. Xiaoqing (Jade) Wang, Texas A&M University | 2025 – Present*

- Extending the isoST 3D reconstruction pipeline to intercellular colocalization analysis on the Zhuang-ABCA-2 MERFISH mouse brain dataset (43.1M cells, 1,122 genes), with target submission to *Bioinformatics*
- Discovered novel cell-type colocalization patterns detectable only in 3D reconstruction, currently validating against 2D MERFISH baselines and published neuroscience literature
- Engineered GPU-accelerated pipeline scaling to 43M cells via FAISS k-NN label propagation, lazy PCA loading (192 GB → 9 GB), and adaptive z-thinning for density correction
- **Tech Stack:** Python, PyTorch, PyTorch Geometric, FAISS GPU, Scanpy, Google Colab (A100)
</div>

## Projects

<div class="experience-entry">
### Time Series Forecasting Comparison Dashboard
*Senior Capstone Project, 2025*

- Developed comprehensive end-to-end dashboard using Streamlit allowing users to compare multiple forecasting methodologies including ARIMA, neural networks, and ensemble methods
- Implemented data preprocessing pipeline with Box-Cox transformations, autocorrelation analysis, and seasonal decomposition to reveal trend and seasonality patterns
- Created educational resources and technical blog to make advanced forecasting accessible to non-technical users
- **Tech Stack:** Python, Streamlit, Polars, TensorFlow/Keras, scikit-learn, NumPy
</div>

<div class="experience-entry">
### Sales Analytics ETL Pipeline & Dashboard
*Statistics and Data Science Consulting Course, 2024*

- Served as data science consultant for a real business client, building a Python/FastAPI ETL pipeline feeding a Tableau dashboard for sales performance across product categories
- Partnered with stakeholders to translate business requirements into data models and visualizations supporting category-level decision-making
- **Tech Stack:** Python, FastAPI, Tableau, SQL
</div>

---

*References available upon request*

</div>
